    /* radial glow blobs */

      position: absolute; width: 420px; height: 420px; border-radius: 50%;

    }

      position: absolute; width: 380px; height: 380px; border-radius: 50%;

    }
    @keyframes blobPulse {
      from { transform: scale(1);   opacity: .7; }
      to   { transform: scale(1.2); opacity: 1;  }
    }

    /* center content */
    #iiari-loader::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 1;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(5,13,26,0.78) 0%, rgba(5,13,26,0.55) 50%, rgba(5,13,26,0.82) 100%);
    }
    .loader-inner {
      position: relative; z-index: 2;
      display: flex; flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center; gap: 0;
      text-align: center;
    }

    /* orbiting ring */
    .loader-orbit-ring, .loader-orbit-ring2 { display: none !important; }
    .loader-orbit-wrap {
      position: relative; width: 140px; height: 140px;
      margin-bottom: 28px;
    }
    .loader-orbit-ring {
      position: absolute; inset: 0;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 1.5px solid rgba(0,180,216,.25);
      animation: orbitSpin 6s linear infinite;
    }
    .loader-orbit-ring::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute; top: -5px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
      width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--sky);
      box-shadow: 0 0 14px var(--sky), 0 0 28px rgba(0,180,216,.6);
    }
    .loader-orbit-ring2 {
      position: absolute; inset: 16px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      border: 1px solid rgba(249,115,22,.18);
      animation: orbitSpin 4s linear infinite reverse;
    }
    .loader-orbit-ring2::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute; bottom: -4px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
      width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--orange);
      box-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--orange), 0 0 20px rgba(249,115,22,.5);
    }
    @keyframes orbitSpin { from { transform: rotate(0deg); } to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

    /* IIARI logo center */
    .loader-globe {
      position: absolute; inset: 0;
      display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
      animation: globePulse 2.2s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    .loader-globe img {
      width: 140px; height: 140px;
      object-fit: contain;
      border-radius: 8px;
      background: transparent;
      padding: 0;
      filter: drop-shadow(0 0 18px rgba(0,180,216,.6));
    }
    @keyframes globePulse {
      0%,100% { transform: scale(1);    }
      50%      { transform: scale(1.06); }
    }

    /* institute name */
    .loader-eyebrow {
      font-family: 'Rajdhani', sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(.65rem, 1.6vw, .82rem); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 3px;
      color: rgba(0,180,216,.8); text-transform: uppercase;
      margin-bottom: 10px; text-align: center;
      line-height: 1.5;
      max-width: 420px;
    }
    .loader-title {
      font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
      font-size: clamp(2.6rem, 6vw, 4rem);

    }
    /* three pillars row */
    .loader-pillars {
      display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap;
      justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 14px;
    }
    .loader-pill {
      font-family: 'Rajdhani', sans-serif;

    }

    /* tagline */

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section class="about" id="about">
  <div class="about-grid">
    <div class="about-left">
      <div class="section-tag reveal">🏛️ About IIARI</div>

      <p class="about-text reveal reveal-delay-2">
        IIARI is a Research &amp; Skilled Course Providing Institute based on Kolkata. It focuses on integrated studies, program implementation, industry and market research. It mainly covers three domains which include academic development, industrial services and consultancy work. Application of various software, system of geographic information and illustration of different skill development programs are the key motto of the academic counterpart. Innumerous short-term courses are offered here, which provides hands-on training and projects that will help you to explore your interests and sharpen your skills to procure a competitive edge in the workspace.
      </p>
      <p class="about-text reveal reveal-delay-2" style="margin-top:12px;">
        IIARI have 3 Divisions i.e. Academic Division, Industrial Division &amp; Consultancy Division. We introduce different Capacity Building Programme, Skilled Base Training Programme, Various Workshops, Seminars, Conferences for the Students. Also Faculty Development Programme, Outreach Programme &amp; more importantly Internship Programme for students to assist them to create the career in a cognitive way.
      </p>
      <div class="about-features reveal reveal-delay-3">

<!-- SCOPE OF THE COURSE -->
<section class="scope" id="scope">
  <div class="section-tag reveal" style="background:rgba(15,118,110,.18);border-color:rgba(15,118,110,.35);color:#5eead4;">📘 Scope of the Course</div>
  <h2 class="section-h2 reveal reveal-delay-1">What You Will Learn</h2>
  <p class="section-lead reveal reveal-delay-1" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);">
    This course is designed for students and professionals who require strong research approaches, GIS &amp; remote sensing skills, and programming knowledge using Python and JavaScript.
  </p>
  <div class="scope-grid">
    <div class="scope-text reveal reveal-delay-2">
      <p style="margin-bottom:18px;">This course will appeal to those who require an understanding of research approaches and skills, and importantly an ability to deploy these in their studies or professional lives using geoinformatics and programming language and its applications.</p>
      <p style="margin-bottom:18px;">It will be very helpful to those who are pursuing Under-graduate and Post-graduate or in any Research area as this will be a main tool in near future for social wellbeing &amp; Research.</p>
      <p>The program covers hands-on training across 12+ industry-standard tools and concludes with real-world industry projects and internship opportunities.</p>
    </div>

    <!-- INLINE PARALLAX GLASS SLIDER replacing the sc-cards -->
    <div class="inline-pslider reveal reveal-delay-3">
      <div class="ips-wrap">

        <div class="ips-slide ips-active" style="--bg: url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1446776811953-b23d57bd21aa?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=85')">
          <div class="ips-content">
            <div class="ips-badge">🛰️ Remote Sensing</div>
            <h3>Satellite Imagery &amp; Analysis</h3>
            <p>Land use mapping, change detection &amp; climate monitoring with industry-grade tools.</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="ips-slide" style="--bg: url('https://vegacosmos.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/geospatial-vs-AI.jpeg');">
          <div class="ips-content">
            <div class="ips-badge">🤖 Artificial Intelligence</div>
            <h3>Artificial Intelligence in GIS</h3>
            <p>ML models, image classification, pattern recognition &amp; AI-driven geospatial intelligence for next-generation mapping.</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="ips-slide" style="--bg: url('https://i.imgur.com/oDoivba.png');">
          <div class="ips-content">
            <div class="ips-badge">🐍 Python</div>
            <h3>Python in GIS</h3>
            <p>Raster analysis, spatial scripting &amp; automation using Python libraries like Leafmap, GeoPandas &amp; Rasterio.</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="ips-slide" style="--bg: url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1473968512647-3e447244af8f?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=85')">
          <div class="ips-content">
            <div class="ips-badge">🚁 UAV / Drone</div>
            <h3>Aerial Photogrammetry</h3>
            <p>Drone surveys, 3D modeling, orthophoto generation &amp; terrain mapping.</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="ips-slide" style="--bg: url('https://miro.medium.com/v2/resize:fit:1200/1*iTxAnjsLIro5UpQRMTVIzA.png')">
          <div class="ips-content">
            <div class="ips-badge">🌐 Web GIS</div>
            <h3>Online Mapping Platforms</h3>
            <p>Interactive dashboards, decision support &amp; spatial collaboration tools.</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="ips-slide" style="--bg: url('https://norwegianscitechnews.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/gpsibilfoto_annesmidling.jpg')">
          <div class="ips-content">
            <div class="ips-badge">📍 GPS Technology</div>
            <h3>GPS Field Technology</h3>
            <p>Precise coordinate collection for surveying, field mapping &amp; asset tracking.</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="ips-slide" style="--bg: url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1521737852567-6949f3f9f2b5?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=85')">
          <div class="ips-content">
            <div class="ips-badge">🏭 Industry Projects</div>
            <h3>Real-World Case Studies</h3>
            <p>Live industry projects &amp; internship opportunities to build your professional portfolio.</p>
          </div>
        </div>

<!-- SOFTWARES -->
<section class="softwares" id="softwares">
  <div class="section-tag reveal">🖥️ Tools &amp; Software</div>

<!-- LEARNING OUTCOMES -->
<section class="learning-outcomes" id="learning-outcomes">
  <span class="section-tag" style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #d4af37, #b88e14); color: #6b3a1f; border: 1px solid #c8a84b;">🗺️ Learning Outcomes</span>
  <h2 class="section-h2 reveal reveal-delay-1" style="text-align:center;; color: #7a4f2e;"><span style="color: #6b3a1f;; color: #7a4f2e;">MASTER THE TOOLS OF GEOSPATIAL ANALYSIS</span></h2>
  <p class="lo-intro reveal reveal-delay-1">From earthquake hazard zonation to urban tree equity mapping — explore real GIS project outputs created by IIARI students, showcasing the skills you'll master after completing this programme.</p>

  <div class="inline-pslider lo-pslider reveal reveal-delay-2">
    <div class="ips-wrap">

      <!-- Slide 1: Hazard Mapping -->
      <div class="ips-slide lo-slide ips-active" style="background-image: url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');">
        <div class="ips-content">
          <div class="ips-badge">⚠️ Hazard Mapping</div>
          <h3>Earthquake Hazard Zonation</h3>
          <p>Map seismic epicentres and generate interpolated hazard zonation maps using GIS — as demonstrated in this real student project on the Myanmar earthquake (28–29 March 2025).</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Slide 2: LULC -->
      <div class="ips-slide lo-slide" style="background-image: url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');">
        <div class="ips-content">
          <div class="ips-badge">🛰️ Remote Sensing</div>
          <h3>Land Use Land Cover Classification</h3>
          <p>Classify satellite imagery into LULC categories — waterbodies, vegetation, settlement, grassland &amp; barren land — using the Support Vector Machine algorithm in ArcGIS/QGIS.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Slide 3: Route Optimization -->
      <div class="ips-slide lo-slide" style="background-image: url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');">
        <div class="ips-content">
          <div class="ips-badge">🚦 Network Analysis</div>
          <h3>Route Optimization &amp; Isochrone Mapping</h3>
          <p>Perform pedestrian accessibility analysis using isochrones and route optimization tools in GIS — demonstrated here for the Kolkata Metropolitan Area using OSM data.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Slide 4: Stream Network -->
      <div class="ips-slide lo-slide" style="background-image: url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');">
        <div class="ips-content">
          <div class="ips-badge">🏔️ Watershed Analysis</div>
          <h3>Stream Network &amp; Drainage Morphometry</h3>
          <p>Generate Strahler stream order–based drainage networks from USGS DEM data — applied here to the Manali Basin, Western Himalayas, for watershed characterisation.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Slide 5: Tree Equity Index -->
      <div class="ips-slide lo-slide" style="background-image: url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');">
        <div class="ips-content">
          <div class="ips-badge">🌳 Urban Ecology</div>
          <h3>Urban Tree Canopy Equity Mapping</h3>
          <p>Map Tree Equity Index (TEI) across urban areas using geospatial analysis — as demonstrated in this student project on Siliguri, West Bengal, revealing canopy equity disparities.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- arrows -->
      <button class="ips-arrow lo-prev" aria-label="Previous">&#10094;</button>
      <button class="ips-arrow lo-next" aria-label="Next">&#10095;</button>

      <!-- dots -->
      <div class="ips-dots lo-dots">
        <div class="ips-dot ips-dot-active"></div>
        <div class="ips-dot"></div>
        <div class="ips-dot"></div>
        <div class="ips-dot"></div>
        <div class="ips-dot"></div>
      </div>

      <!-- progress bar -->
      <div class="ips-progress ips-running" id="loProgress"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

</section>

<footer>
  <div class="footer-left">
    © 2025 <strong>IIARI Kolkata</strong> — MSME, Govt. of India &amp; ISO 9001:2015 Certified
  </div>
  <div class="footer-right">
    <a href="#home">Home</a>
    <a href="#about">About</a>
    <a href="#scope">Course</a>
    <a href="#jobs">Careers</a>
    <a href="#contact">Contact</a>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
  /* ══════════════════════════════════════
     PROFESSIONAL GIS LOADER
  ══════════════════════════════════════ */
  (function() {
    const loader  = document.getElementById('iiari-loader');
    const bar     = document.getElementById('loaderBar');
    const status  = document.getElementById('loaderStatus');
    if (!loader || !bar || !status) return;

    const steps = [
      { pct: 10,  msg: 'Empowering minds through education\u2026' },
      { pct: 25,  msg: 'Building excellence in geospatial research\u2026' },
      { pct: 42,  msg: 'Advancing knowledge in GIS & Remote Sensing\u2026' },
      { pct: 58,  msg: 'Shaping the future of our nation\u2026' },
      { pct: 73,  msg: 'Connecting research with real-world impact\u2026' },
      { pct: 88,  msg: 'Preparing leaders for tomorrow\u2026' },
      { pct: 100, msg: 'Welcome to IIARI \u2014 Excellence Awaits' }
    ];

    let step = 0;
    function tick() {
      if (step >= steps.length) return;
      const s = steps[step++];
      bar.style.width = s.pct + '%';
      status.style.opacity = '0';
      setTimeout(() => {
        status.textContent = s.msg;
        status.style.opacity = '1';
      }, 140);
      if (step < steps.length) {
        setTimeout(tick, step === steps.length - 1 ? 1600 : 1400);
      }
    }
    setTimeout(tick, 800);

    function dismiss() {
      bar.style.width = '100%';
      status.textContent = 'Ready \u2014 Welcome to IIARI';
      setTimeout(() => {
        loader.classList.add('hidden');
        setTimeout(() => { if (loader.parentNode) loader.parentNode.removeChild(loader); }, 700);
      }, 420);
    }

    window.addEventListener('load', () => {
      if (step < steps.length) {
        bar.style.width = '100%';
        step = steps.length;
      }
      setTimeout(dismiss, 2500);
    });

    setTimeout(dismiss, 16000);
  })();

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════
     CUSTOM CURSOR (glowing orange dot only)
  ══════════════════════════════════════ */
  const cur = document.getElementById('cursor');
  document.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
    cur.style.left = e.clientX + 'px';
    cur.style.top  = e.clientY + 'px';
  });

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════
     SCROLL PROGRESS BAR
  ══════════════════════════════════════ */
  const scrollBar = document.getElementById('scroll-progress');
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    const pct = (window.scrollY / (document.body.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight)) * 100;
    scrollBar.style.width = pct + '%';
  }, { passive: true });

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════
     NAVBAR SHRINK ON SCROLL
  ══════════════════════════════════════ */
  const nav = document.querySelector('body > nav');
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    nav.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 60);
  }, { passive: true });

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════
     GLOW MENU TOGGLE
  ══════════════════════════════════════ */
  function toggleMenu() {
    const btn   = document.getElementById('glowToggle');
    const menu  = document.getElementById('glowMenu');
    const overlay = document.getElementById('glowOverlay');
    btn.classList.toggle('open');
    menu.classList.toggle('open');
    overlay.classList.toggle('open');
    document.body.style.overflow = menu.classList.contains('open') ? 'hidden' : '';
  }

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════
     TYPED TEXT EFFECT
  ══════════════════════════════════════ */
  (function() {
    const phrases = [
      'GIS Mapping & Spatial Analysis',
      'Remote Sensing & Satellite Data',
      'Python Scripting & Automation',
      'UAV / Drone Technology',
      'Web GIS Development',
      'GPS Field Data Collection',
    ];
    let pi = 0, ci = 0, deleting = false;
    const el = document.getElementById('typed-text');
    if (!el) return;
    function type() {
      const word = phrases[pi];
      if (!deleting) {
        el.textContent = word.slice(0, ++ci);
        if (ci === word.length) { deleting = true; setTimeout(type, 1800); return; }
      } else {
        el.textContent = word.slice(0, --ci);
        if (ci === 0) { deleting = false; pi = (pi + 1) % phrases.length; }
      }
      setTimeout(type, deleting ? 45 : 80);
    }
    setTimeout(type, 1800);
  })();

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════
     COUNTER ANIMATION
  ══════════════════════════════════════ */
  (function() {
    const stats = [
      { el: null, target: 100, suffix: '%', label: 'Placement' },
    ];
    const statEls = document.querySelectorAll('.stat-val');
    const origVals = [];
    statEls.forEach(el => origVals.push(el.textContent));

    const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
      entries.forEach(e => {
        if (!e.isIntersecting) return;
        const el = e.target;
        const text = el.textContent;
        const num = parseInt(text.replace(/\D/g,''));
        if (isNaN(num) || num === 0) return;
        const suffix = text.replace(/[\d]/g,'');
        let current = 0;
        const step = num / 40;
        const timer = setInterval(() => {
          current = Math.min(current + step, num);
          el.textContent = Math.round(current) + suffix;
          if (current >= num) { clearInterval(timer); el.classList.add('counting'); setTimeout(()=>el.classList.remove('counting'),400); }
        }, 35);
        obs.unobserve(el);
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.7 });
    statEls.forEach(el => obs.observe(el));
  })();

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════
     FLOATING PARTICLES
  ══════════════════════════════════════ */
  (function() {
    const field = document.getElementById('particle-field');
    if (!field) return;
    const colors = ['rgba(249,115,22,', 'rgba(0,180,216,', 'rgba(245,158,11,', 'rgba(15,118,110,'];
    for (let i = 0; i < 35; i++) {
      const p = document.createElement('div');
      p.className = 'particle';
      const size = Math.random() * 5 + 2;
      const color = colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)];
      const opacity = (Math.random() * .5 + .2).toFixed(2);
      const left = Math.random() * 100;
      const delay = Math.random() * 12;
      const duration = Math.random() * 10 + 8;
      p.style.cssText = `
        width:${size}px; height:${size}px;
        left:${left}%;
        background:${color}${opacity});
        box-shadow:0 0 ${size*3}px ${color}.6);
        animation-duration:${duration}s;
        animation-delay:-${delay}s;
      `;
      field.appendChild(p);
    }
  })();

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════
     MAGNETIC BUTTON EFFECT
  ══════════════════════════════════════ */
  document.querySelectorAll('.btn-primary, .btn-outline, .gm-enroll').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
      const rect = btn.getBoundingClientRect();
      const x = e.clientX - rect.left - rect.width/2;
      const y = e.clientY - rect.top - rect.height/2;
      btn.style.transform = `translate(${x*.18}px, ${y*.18}px)`;
    });
    btn.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
      btn.style.transform = '';
    });
  });

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════
     RIPPLE EFFECT ON BUTTONS
  ══════════════════════════════════════ */
  document.querySelectorAll('.ripple-btn').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', e => {
      const rect = btn.getBoundingClientRect();
      const size = Math.max(rect.width, rect.height) * 2;
      const x = e.clientX - rect.left - size/2;
      const y = e.clientY - rect.top - size/2;
      const ripple = document.createElement('span');
      ripple.className = 'ripple-circle';
      ripple.style.cssText = `width:${size}px;height:${size}px;left:${x}px;top:${y}px;`;
      btn.appendChild(ripple);
      setTimeout(() => ripple.remove(), 700);
    });
  });

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════
     CARD TILT EFFECT (feat-row)
  ══════════════════════════════════════ */
  document.querySelectorAll('.feat-row').forEach(card => {
    card.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
      if (card.classList.contains('active')) return;
      const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
      const x = (e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width - 0.5;
      const y = (e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height - 0.5;
      card.style.transform = `translateX(6px) translateY(-2px) rotateY(${x*6}deg) rotateX(${-y*4}deg)`;
    });
    card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
      if (!card.classList.contains('active')) card.style.transform = '';
    });
  });

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════
     FEAT-ROW CLICK EXPAND (5-second auto-close)
  ══════════════════════════════════════ */
  (function() {
    const featRows = document.querySelectorAll('.feat-row');
    const AUTO_CLOSE_MS = 5000;

    featRows.forEach(row => {
      let closeTimer = null;

      function openRow() {
        // Stagger each list item animation
        const items = row.querySelectorAll('.feat-expand ul li');
        items.forEach((li, i) => {
          li.style.animationDelay = `${i * 0.08}s`;
        });

        row.classList.add('active');
        row.querySelector('.feat-expand').classList.add('open');
        row.style.transform = '';

        // Start countdown bar
        const bar = row.querySelector('.feat-timer-bar');
        bar.classList.remove('running');
        bar.style.transition = 'none';
        bar.style.transform = 'scaleX(1)';
        // Force reflow then animate shrink to 0
        bar.getBoundingClientRect();
        bar.style.transition = 'transform 5s linear';
        bar.classList.add('running');
        bar.style.transform = 'scaleX(0)';

        // Auto-close after 5s
        clearTimeout(closeTimer);
        closeTimer = setTimeout(() => closeRow(), AUTO_CLOSE_MS);
      }

      function closeRow() {
        clearTimeout(closeTimer);
        row.classList.remove('active');
        row.querySelector('.feat-expand').classList.remove('open');
        const bar = row.querySelector('.feat-timer-bar');
        bar.classList.remove('running');
        bar.style.transition = 'none';
        bar.style.transform = 'scaleX(1)';
      }

      row.addEventListener('click', () => {
        if (row.classList.contains('active')) {
          closeRow();
        } else {
          // Close any other open row first
          featRows.forEach(r => { if (r !== row) r._closeRow && r._closeRow(); });
          openRow();
        }
      });

      // Expose closeRow so siblings can call it
      row._closeRow = closeRow;
    });
  })();

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════
     3D TILT ON SW-CARDS
  ══════════════════════════════════════ */
  document.querySelectorAll('.sw-card').forEach(card => {
    card.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
      const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
      const x = (e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width - 0.5;
      const y = (e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height - 0.5;
      card.style.transform = `translateY(-6px) rotateX(${-y*12}deg) rotateY(${x*12}deg)`;
    });
    card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
      card.style.transform = '';
    });
  });

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════
     INLINE PARALLAX GLASS SLIDER
  ══════════════════════════════════════ */
  (function() {
    const slides   = document.querySelectorAll('.ips-slide:not(.lo-slide)');
    const dots     = document.querySelectorAll('.ips-dots:not(.lo-dots) .ips-dot');
    const prevBtn  = document.querySelector('.ips-prev');
    const nextBtn  = document.querySelector('.ips-next');
    const progress = document.getElementById('ipsProgress');
    let idx = 0, timer;

    function showSlide(i) {
      const isLoopingBack = (idx === slides.length - 1 && ((i + slides.length) % slides.length) === 0);
      slides[idx].classList.remove('ips-active');
      dots[idx].classList.remove('ips-dot-active');
      idx = (i + slides.length) % slides.length;
      slides[idx].classList.remove('ips-loop-in');
      slides[idx].classList.add('ips-active');
      if (isLoopingBack) {
        void slides[idx].offsetWidth;
        slides[idx].classList.add('ips-loop-in');
        setTimeout(() => slides[idx].classList.remove('ips-loop-in'), 900);
      }
      dots[idx].classList.add('ips-dot-active');
      progress.classList.remove('ips-running');
      progress.style.transition = 'none';
      progress.style.width = '0%';
      requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        progress.style.transition = 'width 5s linear';
        progress.classList.add('ips-running');
      }));
    }

    function startAuto() {
      clearInterval(timer);
      timer = setInterval(() => showSlide(idx + 1), 5000);
    }

    if (nextBtn) nextBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { showSlide(idx + 1); startAuto(); });
    if (prevBtn) prevBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { showSlide(idx - 1); startAuto(); });
    dots.forEach((d, i) => d.addEventListener('click', () => { showSlide(i); startAuto(); }));

    const sliderEl = document.querySelector('.inline-pslider');
    if (sliderEl) {
      sliderEl.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
        const r = sliderEl.getBoundingClientRect();
        const x = ((e.clientX - r.left) / r.width  - .5) * 14;
        const y = ((e.clientY - r.top)  / r.height - .5) * 14;
        const active = sliderEl.querySelector('.ips-slide.ips-active .ips-content');
        if (active) active.style.transform = `translate(${x}px,${y}px)`;
      });
      sliderEl.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
        const active = sliderEl.querySelector('.ips-slide.ips-active .ips-content');
        if (active) active.style.transform = 'translate(0,0)';
      });
      let tx = 0;
      sliderEl.addEventListener('touchstart', e => { tx = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; }, { passive: true });
      sliderEl.addEventListener('touchend', e => {
        const dx = e.changedTouches[0].screenX - tx;
        if (dx < -50) { showSlide(idx + 1); startAuto(); }
        if (dx >  50) { showSlide(idx - 1); startAuto(); }
      }, { passive: true });
    }
    startAuto();
  })();

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════
     NEURAL NETWORK CANVAS
  ══════════════════════════════════════ */
  (function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('neural-canvas');
    if (!canvas) return;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const section = canvas.parentElement;
    let W, H, nodes, animId, mouseX = -999, mouseY = -999;
    const NODE_COUNT = 70;
    const MAX_DIST = 170;
    const PULSE_SPEED = 0.012;

    canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
      const r = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
      mouseX = e.clientX - r.left;
      mouseY = e.clientY - r.top;
    });
    canvas.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { mouseX = -999; mouseY = -999; });

    function resize() {
      W = canvas.width  = section.offsetWidth;
      H = canvas.height = section.offsetHeight;
    }
    function makeNode() {
      return {
        x: Math.random() * W, y: Math.random() * H,
        vx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5,
        vy: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5,
        r: Math.random() * 2.5 + 1.5,
        pulse: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,
      };
    }
    function init() { resize(); nodes = Array.from({ length: NODE_COUNT }, makeNode); }

    function draw() {
      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
      for (const n of nodes) {
        n.x += n.vx; n.y += n.vy; n.pulse += PULSE_SPEED;
        // repel from mouse
        const mdx = n.x - mouseX, mdy = n.y - mouseY;
        const md = Math.sqrt(mdx*mdx + mdy*mdy);
        if (md < 100) { n.x += mdx/md*1.5; n.y += mdy/md*1.5; }
        if (n.x < 0 || n.x > W) n.vx *= -1;
        if (n.y < 0 || n.y > H) n.vy *= -1;
      }
      for (let i = 0; i < nodes.length; i++) {
        for (let j = i + 1; j < nodes.length; j++) {
          const a = nodes[i], b = nodes[j];
          const dx = a.x - b.x, dy = a.y - b.y;
          const dist = Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy);
          if (dist < MAX_DIST) {
            const alpha = (1 - dist / MAX_DIST) * 0.55;
            const glow = 0.4 + 0.6 * Math.sin(a.pulse + b.pulse);
            ctx.save();
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(a.x, a.y);
            ctx.lineTo(b.x, b.y);
            ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(234,179,8,${alpha * glow})`;
            ctx.lineWidth = 0.8 * glow;
            ctx.shadowColor = '#f59e0b';
            ctx.shadowBlur = 6 * glow;
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.restore();
          }
        }
      }
      for (const n of nodes) {
        const glow = 0.6 + 0.4 * Math.sin(n.pulse);
        ctx.save();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(n.x, n.y, n.r * glow, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(251,191,36,${0.7 * glow})`;
        ctx.shadowColor = '#fbbf24';
        ctx.shadowBlur = 14 * glow;
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.restore();
      }
      animId = requestAnimationFrame(draw);
    }
    init(); draw();
    window.addEventListener('resize', () => { cancelAnimationFrame(animId); init(); draw(); });
  })();

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════
     STAGGERED ENTRANCE: SOFTWARE CARDS
  ══════════════════════════════════════ */
  (function () {
    const cards = document.querySelectorAll('.sw-card');
    const obs = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
      entries.forEach(e => {
        if (e.isIntersecting) {
          const i = Array.from(cards).indexOf(e.target);
          e.target.style.transition = `opacity .6s ease ${i * 0.06}s, transform .6s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1) ${i * 0.06}s`;
          e.target.classList.add('sw-visible');
          obs.unobserve(e.target);
        }
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.08 });
    cards.forEach(c => obs.observe(c));

    /* 3-D tilt on mouse move */
    cards.forEach(card => {
      card.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
        const r = card.getBoundingClientRect();
        const x = (e.clientX - r.left) / r.width  - 0.5;
        const y = (e.clientY - r.top)  / r.height - 0.5;
        card.style.transform = `translateY(-8px) scale(1.03) rotateX(${-y*10}deg) rotateY(${x*10}deg)`;
      });
      card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { card.style.transform = ''; });
    });
  })();

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════
     STAGGERED ENTRANCE: JOB CARDS
  ══════════════════════════════════════ */
  (function () {
    const cards = document.querySelectorAll('.job-card');
    const obs = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
      entries.forEach(e => {
        if (e.isIntersecting) {
          const i = Array.from(cards).indexOf(e.target);
          e.target.style.transition = `opacity .55s ease ${i * 0.05}s, transform .55s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1) ${i * 0.05}s`;
          e.target.classList.add('job-visible');
          obs.unobserve(e.target);
        }
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.08 });
    cards.forEach(c => obs.observe(c));
  })();

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════
     PLACEMENT BANNER STATS SPIN-IN
  ══════════════════════════════════════ */
  (function() {
    const pbStats = document.querySelectorAll('.pb-stat-val');
    const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
      entries.forEach(e => {
        if (e.isIntersecting) {
          const delay = Array.from(pbStats).indexOf(e.target) * 200;
          setTimeout(() => e.target.classList.add('spin-in'), delay);
          obs.unobserve(e.target);
        }
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.5 });
    pbStats.forEach(el => obs.observe(el));
  })();

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════
     GENERAL REVEALS
  ══════════════════════════════════════ */
  const reveals = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
  const revealObs = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => {
      if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('visible'); revealObs.unobserve(e.target); }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.12 });
  reveals.forEach(r => revealObs.observe(r));

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════
     SMOOTH SCROLL & ACTIVE SECTION HIGHLIGHT
  ══════════════════════════════════════ */
  document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(a => {
    a.addEventListener('click', e => {
      const target = document.querySelector(a.getAttribute('href'));
      if (target) {
        e.preventDefault();
        target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
      }
    });
  });

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════
     SC-CARD 3D ON HOVER
  ══════════════════════════════════════ */
  document.querySelectorAll('.sc-card').forEach(card => {
    card.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
      const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
      const x = (e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width - 0.5;
      const y = (e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height - 0.5;
      card.style.transform = `translateY(-4px) rotateX(${-y*10}deg) rotateY(${x*10}deg)`;
    });
    card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { card.style.transform = ''; });
  });

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════
     HERO PARALLAX ON SCROLL
  ══════════════════════════════════════ */
  const heroLeft = document.querySelector('.hero-left');
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    if (window.scrollY > 600) return;
    const y = window.scrollY;
    if (heroLeft) heroLeft.style.transform = `translateY(${y * 0.12}px)`;
  }, { passive: true });

  // ── Learning Outcomes parallax on mouse move ──
  document.querySelectorAll('.lo-card').forEach(card => {
    card.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
      const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
      const cx = rect.left + rect.width  / 2;
      const cy = rect.top  + rect.height / 2;
      const dx = (e.clientX - cx) / rect.width;
      const dy = (e.clientY - cy) / rect.height;
      const img = card.querySelector('.lo-img');
      if (img) img.style.transform = `scale(1.1) translate(${dx * 14}px, ${dy * 10 - 6}px)`;
    }, { passive: true });
    card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
      const img = card.querySelector('.lo-img');
      if (img) img.style.transform = '';
    });
  });

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════
     LEARNING OUTCOMES PARALLAX SLIDER
  ══════════════════════════════════════ */
  (function() {
    const slides   = document.querySelectorAll('.lo-slide');
    const dots     = document.querySelectorAll('.lo-dots .ips-dot');
    const prevBtn  = document.querySelector('.lo-prev');
    const nextBtn  = document.querySelector('.lo-next');
    const progress = document.getElementById('loProgress');
    let idx = 0, timer;

    function showSlide(i) {
      slides[idx].classList.remove('ips-active');
      dots[idx].classList.remove('ips-dot-active');
      idx = (i + slides.length) % slides.length;
      slides[idx].classList.add('ips-active');
      dots[idx].classList.add('ips-dot-active');
      progress.classList.remove('ips-running');
      progress.style.transition = 'none';
      progress.style.width = '0%';
      requestAnimationFrame(() => requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        progress.style.transition = 'width 5s linear';
        progress.classList.add('ips-running');
      }));
    }

    function startAuto() {
      clearInterval(timer);
      timer = setInterval(() => showSlide(idx + 1), 5000);
    }

    if (nextBtn) nextBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { showSlide(idx + 1); startAuto(); });
    if (prevBtn) prevBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { showSlide(idx - 1); startAuto(); });
    dots.forEach((d, i) => d.addEventListener('click', () => { showSlide(i); startAuto(); }));

    const sliderEl = document.querySelector('.lo-pslider');
    if (sliderEl) {
      sliderEl.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
        const r = sliderEl.getBoundingClientRect();
        const x = ((e.clientX - r.left) / r.width  - .5) * 14;
        const y = ((e.clientY - r.top)  / r.height - .5) * 14;
        const active = sliderEl.querySelector('.lo-slide.ips-active .ips-content');
        if (active) active.style.transform = `translate(${x}px,${y}px)`;
      });
      sliderEl.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
        const active = sliderEl.querySelector('.lo-slide.ips-active .ips-content');
        if (active) active.style.transform = 'translate(0,0)';
      });
      let tx = 0;
      sliderEl.addEventListener('touchstart', e => { tx = e.changedTouches[0].screenX; }, { passive: true });
      sliderEl.addEventListener('touchend', e => {
        const dx = e.changedTouches[0].screenX - tx;
        if (dx < -50) { showSlide(idx + 1); startAuto(); }
        if (dx >  50) { showSlide(idx - 1); startAuto(); }
      }, { passive: true });
    }
    startAuto();
  })();


</script>
</body>
</html>
